title: achillea serbica
intro: Achillea serbica, also known as White Yarrow or Serbian Yarrow, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Eastern Europe and the Balkan region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Achillea serbica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Achillea serbica can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation.
